title: 당신을 여자로 느낄 때 남자가 하는 행동 6가지 (남자가 이러면 100% 호감)
text: Are you unsure whether the man you like is interested in you or not? Today, I would like to share six behaviors men exhibit when they are interested in a woman. If three or more of these six behaviors match, you can consider him 100% interested in you. It is okay to feel a flutter in your heart. While you might think men would express their interest actively when they are attracted to women, the reality is often quite different. In Dr. John Gray's book, * Men Are from Mars, Women Are from Venus*, there is a passage that states: " When men lack certainty, they never say or do things that might come back to hurt them." What this means is that when men are unsure whether a woman likes them, they rarely express their interest obviously or aggressively make a move, even if they are interested. Because men also have a great fear of getting hurt, most do not rashly make a move or push forward. Occasionally, men with active and bold personalities might muster the courage to make a direct move, but most men tend to show subtle interest from the sidelines while waiting for an opportunity. However, men are simple; if they are interested, I... There are often times when it shows in their actions or facial expressions without you even noticing. To succeed with the man you like, you need the sense to accurately pick up on whether he is interested in you and to draw him closer.

title: 당신을 여자로 느낄 때 남자가 하는 행동 6가지 (남자가 이러면 100% 호감)
text: I... There are often times when it shows in their actions or facial expressions without you even noticing. To succeed with the man you like, you need the sense to accurately pick up on whether he is interested in you and to draw him closer. So, let me quickly explain in detail the 6 behaviors a man exhibits when he is interested in a woman. Please follow along. I would appreciate it if you could subscribe and like the video before watching. First, our eyes meet unusually often. If I look him in the eye and smile, he looks away shyly. When feelings of affection develop, the first thing people unconsciously do is look at each other. Our eyes meet unusually often. Also, even if I look elsewhere, our eyes frequently meet when I look back at him. And if I look him in the eye and smile, he looks away shyly. If this happens, there is a very high probability that he is interested in me. Second, his body is turned toward me when talking to me. He often stumbles over his words when I ask him something. This is a behavior that appears more frequently in men. If his body is leaning toward me and his torso is facing me while we are talking, it is a sign that he is interested in me. Also, when asking a question or answering, if he speaks incoherently or his words... You will often see him acting a bit tangled up. There is one more thing: when men are attracted to someone, their facial expressions are beaming while they talk. There is a saying that men become a little silly in front of the woman they like, and this is true to some extent. Third, when talking, he responds well to what you say by saying "Me too" and remembers what you said. Men have a tendency to try to accommodate the other person in most ways when they are attracted to them. This is revealed precisely through their reactions during conversation. If he listens attentively to your answers and frequently expresses agreement by saying "Me too" or "Me too," it is a sign that he is interested in you. Also, if he remembers and pays attention to things you casually mentioned while speaking, it can be seen as a sign that his interest is strong. Fourth, he shows interest in whether you have a boyfriend or your ideal type. If a man is interested in you, he wants to know information about the men around you. Men tend to want to be seen as cool guys who are acknowledged in front of the woman they like. They subtly insert strengths that set them apart from other men into the conversation to appeal to you. For example, they might say things like, "I'm the type to be extremely affectionate when I have a girlfriend," or " I do this kind of exercise," or "I've done these things before," subtly dropping hints about their abilities, career, and positive qualities. If you get the feeling that he is making these kinds of appeals in front of you, it is an action to make a good impression because he is interested in you. Also, he tries to let you know who he is without being asked. When a man develops feelings for the opposite sex, he feels a desire to share and let others know about himself, so he starts talking about himself even without being asked. [Music] Sixth, he drops hints promising a future meeting. If men drop hints promising a future meeting at the end of a conversation, this is 100% proof that he is interested in you. For example, if you said your favorite food is gopchang (grilled intestines) and he says, " Really? I know a really delicious gopchang place; would you like to go together when you have time?" or "There's a new Avatar coming out; have you seen it? If you have n't, would you like to go watch it together when our schedules align?" If he drops hints that lead to a next meeting or a connection with a nuance like, "I know how, but should I teach you?", it means that he wants to see you more.
